title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Frontend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
